title: About the Production surveys | Stats NZ
content:
## About the Production surveys
21 September 2023, 10:45am
Information about taking part in a Production survey – Poultry or a Production Survey – Ready-mixed concrete, such as why we carry out the surveys, how we selected you, and how to complete the questionnaire.
We carry out the production surveys to measure the volume of production of the poultry and ready-mixed concrete industry sectors.
If your business is involved in the poultry or ready-mixed concrete industry sectors, you will be selected to participate in the relevant production survey.
The questions included in this survey are being asked under the Data and Statistics Act 2022.
Our approach to survey compliance has more information about your legal obligation to participate in the Production surveys.
These surveys are carried out every quarter.

## How to complete the survey
You fill in a paper questionnaire.
- Contact us for survey help 26 May 2020
- Business survey information 31 July 2017
- Privacy, security, and confidentiality of survey data 20 May 2026
- Manufacturing and production 01 January 2017 Image: construction saw
